user.title: Telemetry (Power Sensors)
user.description: Select the power sensors for your battery system.

energy.title: Energy & Metrics
energy.description: Configure cumulative energy sensors, load sensitivity, and system constants.

data.import_price_entity: Import Price Forecast Entity (e.g. Amber General)
data.export_price_entity: Export Price Forecast Entity (e.g. Amber Feed-in)
data.use_amber_express: Use Amber Express nested array format
data.current_import_price_entity: Import Price Entity (e.g. Amber Express General Price Detailed) [Optional - Only if Amber Express used]
data.current_export_price_entity: Export Price Entity (e.g. Amber Express Feed-in Price Detailed) [Optional - Only if Amber Express used]

cost_tracking.title: Cost Tracking Details (Optional)
cost_tracking.description: OPTIONAL: Extract continuous realtime cumulative costs natively from the grid volume via your retailer. WARNING: These sensors MUST be native Amber Express settled-price entities. Generic predictive pricing models will not map mathematically to past periods.

data.tracker_import_price: Amber Express Grid Import Settled Price ($/kWh)
data.tracker_export_price: Amber Express Grid Export Settled Price ($/kWh)

control.title: Control Services (Optional)
control.description: Map the entities used to control the Powerwall. Leave blank for debug/observation mode.
